name: Wild Mushroom Soup (Kisler)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Marjoram, fresh or 3/4 tsp Marjoram, dried
1/2 medium Potato, peeled and cut into 1/2-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. See recipes for Beef Stock and Clarified Butter.
2. Soak cepes in Madeira and hot water to cover for 20 to 30 minutes. Drain, reserving the liquid in which they were soaked.
3. Rinse and drain the cepes; chop coarsely.
4. In a saucepan, heat 2 tablespoons of butter over medium-high heat and add cepes, onion, and marjoram. Toss for 2 minutes.
5. Add vinegar, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and reserved liquid. Simmer for 5 minutes; set aside.
6. In a separate saucepan, melt remaining butter; stir in flour and cook for 3 minutes.
7. Whisk in stock and bring the mixture to a boil.
8. Add cream and carrot and simmer, covered.
9. Meanwhile, blanch potato in boiling salted water for 3 minutes; drain and rinse under cold water. When carrot is nearly tender, add potato and cook until all ingredients are tender (about 5 minutes).
10. Add cepes mixture and simmer for 5 minutes.
11. Add lemon juice and adjust seasonings to taste with salt and white pepper.
12. Add parsley and serve.
